description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tapp-win64 that runs on every push to the vcv branch and on pull requests to that branch. Use a single ubuntu-latest job that checks out the repository and its submodules, installs OpenGL development libraries, sets up a tmate session, builds binaries using the tapp-mingw64-action, archives the binaries into a zip file, creates a draft pre-release with a generated name and description, and uploads the zip file as a release asset.
